scope: Close the false-negative bound where multiple individually sub-threshold token transfers enter configured CEX addresses during one fully covered scan window.

reproduction.old_path: Each sampled receipt applied the CEX minimum independently. Cross-transaction direct CEX inflows that were individually below the token and quote thresholds returned no row and never reached window analysis.

fixture.expected_result: CEX risk gate is active because the complete-window token total exceeds the token threshold.

fail_closed_conditions: conflicting payloads at one transaction-hash/log-index anchor

configured_cex_residual_aggregation.receipt_overlap_rule: Exclude every transaction already represented by a receipt row with positive CEX amount or count.
configured_cex_residual_aggregation.runtime_candidate_overlap_rule: external-to-candidate stays aggregate_only; candidate-to-configured-CEX stays cex_internal_aggregation; FIFO attributed external inflow remains the only runtime-candidate risk contribution.
configured_cex_residual_aggregation.coverage_rule: Require requested_window_complete, complete=true, exact requested from/to bounds, covered-through equal to the scan end, returned logs below max logs, and valid log identities.
configured_cex_residual_aggregation.incomplete_coverage_rule: Preserve observed amount/count fields; zero CEX risk amount, quote estimate, and count; emit none_incomplete_coverage.

reporting.json_and_markdown: Keep destination, observed amount/count, source/path roles, deduplication metadata, coverage state, and runtime effect.
reporting.telegram: Reuse the existing compact CEX summary; do not add addresses, transaction hashes, coverage fields, or aggregation diagnostics.

verification_matrix.expected: observed 120000; risk amount/count zero; no alert
exact duplicates counted once; distinct log indexes retained
coverage invalid; all window risk contributions disabled
risk amount/count zero; report-only classifier unchanged; no alert
FIFO runtime amount 80000 plus direct amount 120000 equals 200000, count 3, runtime candidate count 1
one compact CEX summary, at most 320 characters and 5 lines, no address or coverage diagnostics

preserved_invariants: one economic contribution for candidate-to-CEX sweeps
CEX internal and Alpha custody paths stay direction unknown, runtime effect none, report-only
read-only monitoring with no signing or trade execution
remaining_external_dependencies: A natural production sample with multiple direct sub-threshold configured-CEX transfers has not yet appeared.
The three Binance Alpha Hot Wallet UI rows still require exact transaction hashes from the user-facing app.
Window-start inventory remains unavailable to a bounded transfer-log scan.
